{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Advocate symbol
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]] has an [[Advocate symbol]] on his chest.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c46">''The Engineer'', chapter 46</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
